growth_records.strain: JCM 39074 (pure culture, host organism isolated from Micrarchaeum co-culture)

sec.method: growth phase tracked via ferrozine assay of Fe(III)->Fe(II) reduction; rate not quantified numerically in text

growth_records.cite: Krause et al. The importance of biofilm formation for cultivation of a Micrarchaeon and its interactions with its Thermoplasmatales host. Nature Communications (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41467-022-29263-y. [PMC8975820]
growth_records.snippet: the doubling time of Ca. Scheffleriplasma hospitalis in co-culture (7.49 +/- 1.45 days, n=3) was not significantly different ... to the doubling time of the organism cultivated without its interaction partner (7.19 +/- 3
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of pure-culture Ca. Scheffleriplasma hospitalis (7.19 +/- 3.80 days, n=3) explicitly reported. Cultured anoxically in modified Picrophilus medium (5% H2/95% N2 headspace) supplemented with yeast extract 0.1%, casein hydrolysate 0.1%, ferric sulphate 20 mM, at pH 2.0 or 2.5, 22C (Culturing conditions section states both pure culture and co-culture grown at 'a pH of 2.0 or 2.5'; pure-culture comparison performed 'under otherwise identical conditions' to co-culture). growth_rate_per_h calculated: doubling_time_h = 7.19 d x 24 = 172.56 h; mu = ln2/172.56 = 0.004016 h-1.

growth_records.strain: co-culture with Candidatus Micrarchaeum harzensis (DPANN symbiont)

sec.method: growth phase tracked via ferrozine assay of Fe(III)->Fe(II) reduction; rate not quantified numerically in text

growth_records.cite: Krause et al. The importance of biofilm formation for cultivation of a Micrarchaeon and its interactions with its Thermoplasmatales host. Nature Communications (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41467-022-29263-y. [PMC8975820]
growth_records.snippet: the doubling time of Ca. Scheffleriplasma hospitalis in co-culture (7.49 +/- 1.45 days, n=3) was not significantly different ... to the doubling time of the organism cultivated without its interaction partner (7.19 +/- 3
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of Ca. Scheffleriplasma hospitalis when grown in co-culture with Ca. Micrarchaeum harzensis (7.49 +/- 1.45 days, n=3) explicitly reported. Anoxic modified Picrophilus medium, yeast extract 0.1%, casein hydrolysate 0.1%, ferric sulphate 20 mM, pH lowered to 2.0 to enhance biofilm formation of the co-culture, 22C. growth_rate_per_h calculated: doubling_time_h = 7.49 d x 24 = 179.76 h; mu = ln2/179.76 = 0.003856 h-1.
